data.title: Strive's SATA Secures Funds for Bitcoin Acquisition
data.description: Strive's subsidiary, SATA, has reportedly gathered sufficient funds to purchase 184 BTC. According to Odaily, Strive is the first company to fully adhere to the Bitcoin treasury strategy advocated by Michael Saylor.

data.title: Guangzhou Port Reports April 2026 Throughput Estimates
data.description: Guangzhou Port announced on April 30, 2026, that it expects to handle 2.384 million TEUs (twenty-foot equivalent units) in April, marking a 0.5% increase compared to the same period last year. According to Jin10, the port also anticipates a cargo throughput of 51.084 million tons for the month, reflecting a 1.2% year-on-year growth. For the period from January to April 2026, Guangzhou Port estimates a total container throughput of 9.059 million TEUs, up 4.3% from the previous year, and a cargo throughput of 191.26 million tons, representing a 2.7% increase year-on-year.

data.title: BitMart will list MegaETH (MEGA)
data.description: According to an official announcement, BitMart will list MegaETH (MEGA) on April 30th at 19:00 (UTC+8), with the MEGA/USDT trading pair available. MegaETH is the first real-time blockchain, allowing crypto applications to fully realize its potential with its extreme performance. Secured by Ethereum, MegaETH utilizes a highly optimized execution environment with a heterogeneous architecture. It offers streaming throughput with 10ms latency and up to 100,000 TPS. Developers can extend their applications using real-time state streaming, and users can enjoy instant transactions while retaining Ethereum's full composability.

data.title: Thailand's Central Bank: GDP May Contract in Q1
data.description: Thailand's central bank has indicated that the country's GDP might experience a quarter-on-quarter contraction in the first quarter. According to Jin10, this potential economic downturn is attributed to various factors impacting Thailand's economic performance. The central bank's assessment highlights concerns over domestic and international economic conditions that could influence growth rates. Further details on the specific causes of this anticipated contraction were not provided in the report.

data.title: Strive's SATA subsidiary is expected to have raised enough funds to purchase 184 BTC.
data.description: Strive's subsidiary SATA reportedly raised enough funds yesterday to purchase 184 BTC. Strive is the first company to fully comply with Saylor's Bitcoin treasury strategy. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: Gonka Protocol Releases Milestone Update to Address DeAI Issues
data.description: Gonka Protocol has recently launched its significant 0.2.12 version update. According to PANews, this update is not only a technical iteration but also a strategic move to tackle the challenges within the DeAI sector.

data.title: USDC Yield Opportunities on Solana and Polygon Blockchains
data.description: Users can now earn yields in USDC on the Solana and Polygon blockchains. According to PANews, this development allows individuals to leverage these platforms for potential financial gains using the stablecoin USDC. The integration of yield opportunities on these blockchains aims to enhance user engagement and provide more options for cryptocurrency investors.

data.title: Trade.xyz Sees Surge in Traditional Asset Contracts on Hyperliquid Platform
data.description:
On April 30, Trade.xyz experienced a notable increase in activity on the Hyperliquid platform, according to BlockBeats On-chain Detection. The deployment of traditional asset mapping contracts through the HIP-3 protocol has seen open interest rise to previous highs, reaching $2.156 billion, which accounts for over 90% of the HIP-3 market share. Concurrently, trading volume has reached approximately $2.718 billion.

In other developments, U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that blockade measures are 'more effective than bombing' and has rejected Iran's three-stage negotiation proposal. This has contributed to escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, leading to a significant surge in the crude oil market. Brent crude oil prices have approached their highest levels in nearly two years. Driven by these factors, trading activity for WTIOIL and BRENTOIL on the Hyperliquid platform has increased, with a combined daily trading volume of $1.32 billion, surpassing the trading volume of ETH during the same period.

data.title: European Stocks Decline as Markets Open
data.description: European stock markets experienced a downturn as trading commenced, with several indices showing notable declines. According to ChainCatcher, the German DAX30 index fell by 0.9%, while France's CAC40 index dropped 1.3%. Additionally, the Euro Stoxx 50 index decreased by 1.2%, reflecting broader market challenges across the region.

data.title: Switzerland's April KOF Economic Leading Indicator Exceeds Expectations
data.description: Switzerland's KOF Economic Leading Indicator for April was reported at 97.9, surpassing the expected value of 95.9. According to Jin10, the previous value was revised from 96.1 to 95.6.

data.title: Spain's Q1 GDP Growth Rate Exceeds Expectations
data.description: Spain's GDP growth rate for the first quarter was reported at 0.6%, surpassing the anticipated 0.5%, according to Jin10. The previous quarter's growth rate was recorded at 0.80%.

data.title: Binance: The Binance Alpha airdrop will be available today at 18:00 (UTC+8). The airdrop threshold is 240 Alpha Credits.
data.description: Binance announced that the Binance Alpha airdrop will be available to claim starting today at 18:00 (UTC+8). This event uses an upgraded "Alpha Blind Box" model, with the airdrop pool containing tokens from multiple projects. Users holding at least 240 Binance Alpha Points can claim a token reward once. It's first-come, first-served. Claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. This airdrop has three reward tiers: Regular (80% of the pool), Rare (15%), and Hidden (5%), each corresponding to a different Alpha Blind Box value. Users will be assigned to one tier upon claiming, and rewards will be distributed proportionally based on these tiers. If rewards are not fully distributed, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every five minutes.

data.title: SoFi Technologies Reports Strong Financial Growth in Q1 2026
data.description:
SoFi Technologies, a regulated digital financial services platform, has released its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. According to Foresight News, the company reported a net revenue of $1.1 billion, marking a 43% increase from the previous year. Net profit reached $167 million, representing a 134% year-over-year growth.

During the same period, SoFi's total membership rose to 14.7 million, a 35% increase compared to the previous year. The total number of products offered by the company grew to 22.2 million, reflecting a 39% rise. Additionally, the loan origination volume amounted to $12.2 billion, up 68% from the previous year.

data.title: France's March PPI Shows Slight Increase
data.description: France's Producer Price Index (PPI) for March recorded an annual rate of 0.2%, according to Jin10. This marks an improvement from the previous value of -2.40%.

data.title: Bitget will list SKYAI and MEGA spot trading.
data.description: Bitget will launch spot trading for SKYAI (SKYAI) and MegaETH (MEGA). Deposit channels are now open, and trading channels will open on April 30th at 16:00 and 19:00 (UTC+8) respectively.

data.title: Gate Alpha's May Day Special Event Begins with a Total Prize Pool of $100,000
data.description: According to official news, Gate Alpha officially launched its May Day special event on April 30th at 14:00 (UTC+8). Users can participate in sharing airdrop rewards worth over $100,000 by trading designated hot cryptocurrencies. This event features a dual reward mechanism: On the basic side, users receive one entry into a regular blind box draw for every 200 USDT traded, with a total prize pool of approximately $30,000 and a 100% winning rate. Prizes include an iPhone 17, GT tokens, and Alpha fee rebates. On the advanced side, after reaching 2,000 USDT in trading volume, users receive one entry into a premium blind box draw for every 500 USDT exceeding that amount, with a total prize pool of approximately $76,000. Prizes include an iPhone 17 Pro Max, a high value of GT tokens, and a high value of Alpha fee rebates. Furthermore, both the referrer and the new user will receive additional rewards for inviting friends who make their first trade of 100 USDT or more. All rewards are distributed in real time, while supplies last. Gate Alpha now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, Gate Layer, BNB Chain, Base, SUI, ARB, World Chain, AVAX, Polygon, LINEA, ZK, OP, and Berachain. It also enables seamless trading of tokens across the entire chain through the contract address search function, opening up cross-chain transaction links and allowing you to access all on-chain tokens with a single click.

data.title: Japanese and South Korean stock markets closed lower.
data.description: The Nikkei 225 index closed down 632.54 points, or 1.06%, at 59,284.92 on Thursday, April 30. The South Korean KOSPI index closed down 93.03 points, or 1.39%, at 6,597.87 on Thursday, April 30. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ripple Expands in UAE with New Headquarters in Dubai
data.description: Ripple has inaugurated a new headquarters in the Dubai International Financial Centre, aiming to strengthen its presence in the Middle East and Africa. According to NS3.AI, the company stated that the new office will serve as a base to potentially double its workforce in the region. Ripple emphasized that the facility will support the growing demand for blockchain-based payment and custody services in the area.

data.title: Meta's European Stock Drops 7.2% Amid AI Spending and Legal Concerns
data.description: Meta's stock in Europe fell by 7.2% as the market expressed concerns over the company's spending on artificial intelligence and ongoing legal scrutiny. According to Jin10, investors are worried about the financial implications of Meta's investments in AI technologies and the potential impact of legal challenges on its operations. The decline reflects broader apprehensions about the sustainability of Meta's strategic initiatives in the face of regulatory pressures.

data.title: BitGo Transfers 312 BTC to New Wallets
data.description: Two newly created wallets have received a total of 312 BTC from BitGo over the past 24 hours, valued at $23.62 million. According to NS3.AI, this transfer highlights ongoing activity in the cryptocurrency market, as significant amounts of Bitcoin are moved between wallets. The reasons behind these transfers remain unclear, but they could be related to strategic repositioning or security measures.
